preferences.name: shellPath
preferences.title: Shell Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the shell RayTerm should start.

preferences.name: shellArgs
preferences.title: Shell Arguments
preferences.description: Arguments passed to the shell. The default starts an interactive login shell.

preferences.name: workingDirectory
preferences.title: Working Directory
preferences.description: Directory where the shell starts. Supports ~. Falls back to your home directory if blank or invalid.

preferences.name: pythonPath
preferences.title: Python Path
preferences.description: Python executable used to run the local RayTerm daemon.

preferences.name: terminalColumns
preferences.title: Terminal Columns
preferences.description: Column count reported to the shell through COLUMNS and the PTY window size.

preferences.name: maxTranscriptLines
preferences.title: Transcript Line Limit
preferences.description: Maximum rendered terminal lines kept in the Raycast Detail view.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
